hero revamp — src/pages/Index.tsx: rewrite the hero section to lead with Vision Affichage's core value prop: premium custom merch, FAST delivery (48-72h rush available). Add a prominent delivery speed badge, a bold one-liner headline, a clean CTA. Use the existing navy #1B3A6B + blue #0052CC + gold #E8A838 palette. Premium, simple, Apple-inspired. Feel: confident, fast, quality.

typography system — audit all font sizes/weights across src/pages/Index.tsx, src/pages/Boutique.tsx, src/components/customizer/*. Establish a clear hierarchy: display/h1/h2/h3/body/caption. Update any rogue sizes to the system. Use Tailwind's type scale consistently. Premium = generous line-height, tight tracking on headings.

trust signals banner — add a thin strip below the hero showing: Livraison 48-72h / Impression locale Québec / Garantie satisfaction / 500+ entreprises. Icons from lucide-react. Bilingual. Premium, subtle, not cheesy.

product card revamp — src/components/ProductCard.tsx (or wherever product cards render in Boutique): photography-first layout, subtle shadow-on-hover, price prominent but not shouty, fast-delivery badge if applicable. Use aspect-square for image. Generous padding.

premium motion design — pass through src/pages/Index.tsx and reduce motion verbosity. Keep only the 2-3 most impactful animations (hero entrance, section reveal). Remove hover-bounces that feel consumer-y. Apple/Linear aesthetic: subtle, purposeful, fast easing.

spacing + rhythm audit — every section in Index.tsx should follow an 8pt grid. Increase breathing room between major sections to feel premium (py-20 md:py-28 for majors). Tighten inline element spacing for crispness.

color consistency — grep for any rogue colors outside the navy #1B3A6B / blue #0052CC / gold #E8A838 / neutral (zinc) palette. Replace outliers with palette tokens. Ensure text contrast is AAA on primary CTAs.

delivery speed section — add a new section to the homepage dedicated to speed: '3 jours. De la commande au port-à-la-main.' Visual timeline showing Day 1 (conception), Day 2 (production), Day 3 (livraison). Bilingual. Icon-driven.
social proof — revamp the Google reviews section to feel premium, not busy. Fewer reviews shown at once, bigger quotes, verified badge, overall rating prominent. Smooth carousel with dot indicators.

CTA consistency — every primary CTA across the site should use the same button component and copy pattern ('Commencer', 'Obtenir un devis', 'Personnaliser') in bilingual parallel. Audit and standardize.

admin — create src/pages/admin/AdminDashboard.tsx with sidebar + topbar layout, widgets for: Orders today, Revenue this week, Pending quotes, Low inventory. Mock data. Premium admin UI inspired by Linear/Vercel.
admin — create src/components/admin/AdminLayout.tsx (sidebar + topbar) used across all admin pages. Route protection placeholder. Dark-mode-friendly.
admin — create src/pages/admin/AdminOrders.tsx with a table: date, client, items, total, status, actions. Drawer for order details. Filters: date range, status. Mock data.
admin — create src/pages/admin/AdminProducts.tsx showing Shopify-synced products: image, title, price, inventory, status. Filter, search. Sync status indicator (mock).
admin — create src/pages/admin/AdminVendors.tsx listing vendor accounts: name, email, quotes sent, conversion rate, last active. Add vendor button (modal stub).
admin — create src/pages/admin/AdminSettings.tsx with sections for Company info, Shopify connection, Payment settings, Team & roles. Form placeholders.

vendor — create src/pages/vendor/QuoteBuilder.tsx: left panel product picker (searchable), right panel building cart (items, qty, color, size, placement note, zone price add-on), bottom: discount %/$ field, client email, 'Send quote' button. Save draft button. Premium UI.
vendor — create src/pages/vendor/QuoteList.tsx: vendor's quotes with status pill (Draft, Sent, Viewed, Accepted, Paid, Expired), client, total, discount, age. Sort + filter. Quick-duplicate action.
vendor — create src/pages/vendor/VendorDashboard.tsx with widgets: quotes sent this week, conversion rate, commission earned, quick-create-quote button. Premium.

client quote page — create src/pages/QuoteAccept.tsx at /quote/:id: shows the vendor-built cart (products, colors, sizes, placement, pricing), 'Upload your logo' section (file dropzone, accepted formats), T&C checkbox, 'Review & Pay' button (disabled stub). Mobile-first.

logo upload component — create src/components/LogoUploadDropzone.tsx: drag-drop, preview, file size validation (max 10MB), format check (png, svg, pdf, ai), remove button. Used in QuoteAccept and ProductCustomizer. Styled, premium.

types — create src/types/admin.ts and src/types/quote.ts with: User, AdminUser, VendorUser, ClientUser, Order, OrderItem, Quote, QuoteLineItem, Discount, QuoteStatus enum. Clean TypeScript for the UI layer to consume.
route all new admin/vendor/quote pages in src/App.tsx with React.lazy + Suspense for code-splitting

accessibility pass — src/pages/Index.tsx: aria-hidden on decorative emoji and SVGs, aria-label on star ratings, fix footer Contact to have href or role=button, prefers-reduced-motion guard on logo marquee, proper heading hierarchy

mobile polish — audit all pages at 375px viewport. Fix horizontal scroll, cramped spacing, small touch targets. Specifically: homepage hero, Boutique filter bar, Customizer steps, BottomNav spacing with pb-20 on all root containers.
icons + delivery badge component — create src/components/DeliveryBadge.tsx showing '48-72h' with a bolt icon, used on hero, product cards, and cart page. Bilingual, subtle gold accent.
footer revamp — make the footer premium: Vision Affichage logo, tagline, 3 column links (Boutique, Entreprise, Support), social icons, copyright. Bilingual. Newsletter signup at the bottom (UI only).
404 + error page polish — make NotFound.tsx beautiful: illustration (or big 404 type), friendly bilingual copy, CTA back to home. Match brand aesthetic.
performance — lazy-load all below-the-fold images on Index.tsx and Boutique.tsx, add width/height to all img tags to prevent CLS
SEO + meta — index.html: add JSON-LD Organization schema, ensure meta description is bilingual-aware, open graph image, twitter card image (use existing brand assets)
